title: Robust Herbal Portuguese Beef Cutlet Stir Fry
description: A tender and flavorful Portuguese dish featuring beef cutlet, perfect for a sick day, with a blend of herbs and wok-hei flavor, served in a lazy-susan-spinner for easy sharing.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef cutlet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dried thyme and rosemary to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced bell peppers and onions to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and herbs.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
